{{CargoRelic
|name=VVVVIP Card
|class_id=20410
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=1st time reward from [[Altar#Gods_of_the_Pantheon|God of Whales]]
|description=I'll be waiting for you at eight tonight if you have the guts to raid with me! No need to buy anything, you can get all kinds of gear for free! In-game trades are all done within seconds! No cash is involved at all! This is such a cool and beneficial game!
|fame=27
|art=17
|fth=17
|civ=14
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>With VIP Gem Card, Snail ATK +20<br>With VIP Silver Card, Snail DEF +20<br>With VIP Gold Card, Snail RUSH +20
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>With VIP Gem Card, Snail ATK +40<br>With VIP Silver Card, Snail DEF +40<br>With VIP Gold Card, Snail RUSH +40
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>With VIP Gem Card, Snail ATK +60<br>With VIP Silver Card, Snail DEF +60<br>With VIP Gold Card, Snail RUSH +60
|ss4=Snail HP +300<br>With VIP Gem Card, Snail ATK +60<br>With VIP Silver Card, Snail DEF +60<br>With VIP Gold Card, Snail RUSH +60
|ss7=Snail HP +300<br>With VIP Gem Card, Snail ATK +60<br>With VIP Silver Card, Snail DEF +60<br>With VIP Gold Card, Snail RUSH +60<br> (Awakened)
}}
